# CWE-1333 negative: linear-time tag validation (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1333-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1333 mitigated: simple anchored pattern and length cap prevent ReDoS.

import (
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
	"sync"
	"unicode"
)

var safeTagPatternPure = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z]{1,32}$`)

var commentStoreSafeMu sync.Mutex
var commentStoreSafePure = map[string]string{}

func ValidateCommentTagSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err := r.ParseForm(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		tag := r.FormValue("tag")
		if len(tag) > 32 {
			http.Error(w, "tag too long", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		for _, r := range tag {
			if !unicode.IsLetter(r) {
				http.Error(w, "invalid tag", http.StatusBadRequest)
				return
			}
		}
		if !safeTagPatternPure.MatchString(tag) {
			http.Error(w, "invalid tag", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		commentStoreSafeMu.Lock()
		commentStoreSafePure[tag] = r.FormValue("body")
		commentStoreSafeMu.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
